templateOptions.label: ApiToken
templateOptions.description: The API Token used to authenticate. This must be retrieved from within the application

templateOptions.label: BaseUrl
templateOptions.description: The url to connect to StudyTube

templateOptions.label: CompanyID
templateOptions.description: The CompanyID for the StudyTube environment

templateOptions.label: Enable TLS1.2
templateOptions.description: Enables TLS 1.2. Note that is not necessary when running the connector in the cloud
